name: icp
description: ICP — Intelligent Commerce Platform (Hackathon 2026 monorepo root)

scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/dist packages/*/dist apps/*/.next
scripts.openapi:export: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml -f infra/docker-compose.observability.yml exec -T -e EXPORT_OPENAPI=true gateway node /workspace/apps/gateway/dist/main.js; docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml -f infra/docker-compose.observability.yml cp gateway:/workspace/packages/shared-types/openapi.json packages/shared-types/openapi.json
scripts.openapi:generate: pnpm --filter @icp/shared-types exec openapi --input openapi.json --output src/api --client fetch --useUnionTypes --exportCore true --exportServices true --exportModels true --indent 2
